## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not add secrets, tokens, private keys, or credentials.
- [ ] I did not modify hooks to run unsafe commands.
- [ ] I did not add or change MCP server configuration without explaining the security impact.
- [ ] I did not add unreviewed third-party dependencies.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I tested or manually reviewed the change.
